summary: Broad draft PR improving matching/source shape across Dolphin/SysDolphin and many Melee directories. The PR reported 26 new matches, 79 unmatched-item improvements, matched code +11944 bytes, matched data +448 bytes, and clean regression counts, but was closed unmerged and superseded by directory-specific split draft PRs.

key_files.role: THP decoder matching cleanup; __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN changed raw mcuBuffer offset cast to THPFileInfoMCUBufferView accesses and reused local info pointer.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: THPDec __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN listed as +24 unmatched-item improvement

key_files.role: camera matching cleanup; local declaration ordering, temporary expression factoring, assert expansion, and PAD_STACK adjustment.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Camera_80030CFC listed as new match; Camera_80029CF8 listed as improvement

key_files.role: fighter common cleanup; removed unnecessary pointer temp, used helper inline, used typed field access instead of M2C_FIELD in shown excerpt.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: ftCo_800AF290 and ftCo_800A9CB4 listed as improvements

key_files.role: fighter common matching cleanup; declaration order/lifetime changes, local extern float for zero value, typed Link catch attrs, direct fighter-var item use.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: ftCo_800D730C listed as new match; fn_800D8EC8 listed as improvement

key_files.role: fighter DamageIce matching cleanup; expanded local JObj rotation matrix logic with explicit Quaternion and Mtx locals.
fighter material data/code matching; added static HSD_TevDesc and HSD_TECnst data before force_active block.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: ftmaterial .data listed as new match; ftMaterial_800BF260 and ftMaterial_800BF534 listed as new matches

key_files.role: game-mode matching cleanup; simplified loop temp access, ternary bool return, and helper use replacing explicit unlock search loop.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: gm_80164330 listed as new match; gm_80164910 listed as improvement

key_files.role: stage matching hotspot; largest stage source change and top new text match in report.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: grIceMt_801F686C listed as new match; gricemt .sdata listed as new match

key_files.role: SysDolphin matching hotspot; largest changed file and largest data improvement in report.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: particle .data listed as +620 unmatched-item improvement; Exception_ReportCodeline and Exception_ReportStackTrace listed as new matches

key_files.role: Additional changed files: src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_DownBound.c, ftCo_Guard.c, ftKirby/ftkirbyyoshiegg.c, ftNana/ftNn_Init.c, ft/ftcoll.c, gm/gm_16AE.c, gm/gm_16F1.c, gm/gm_1832.c, gm/gm_18A5.c, gm/gm_1A4C.c, gm/gmregclear.c, gm/gmresult.c, gm/gmresultplayer.c, gm/gmtou.c, gr/granime.c, gr/grbigblue.c, gr/grcastle.c, gr/grcorneria.c, gr/grgreens.c, gr/grinishie1.c, gr/grinishie2.c, gr/grmutecity.c, gr/ground.c, gr/grrcruise.c, gr/grvenom.c, gr/grzebes.c, if/soundtest.c, if/textlib.c, it/itcoll.c, it/items/itarwinglaser.c, itkyasarin.c, itlinkhookshot.c, itsamusgrapple.c, itseakchain.c, itseakneedlethrown.c, lb/lb_00CE.c, lb/lb_00F9.c, lbbgflash.c, lbcollision.c, lbdvd.c, lbrefract.c, mn/mncount.c, mndiagram.c, mnitemsw.c, mnmain.c, mnnamenew.c, mnsnap.c, mp/mpcoll.c, mp/mplib.c, pl/pltrick.c, ty/toy.c, tydisplay.c, tylist.c, vi/vi0502.c, sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.c, hsd_3B34.c, sislib.c, synth.c.

what_changed: Changed 67 files with 941 additions and 757 deletions across extern/dolphin, src/sysdolphin, and many src/melee directories.
Reported GALE01 matching delta after rebase on 07bb71f: matched code 71.86% (+0.31%, +11944 bytes) and matched data 41.67% (+0.04%, +448 bytes).
Reported 26 new matches, including grIceMt_801F686C, ftCo_800D730C, gm_80164330, Camera_80030CFC, Exception_ReportCodeline, and Exception_ReportStackTrace.
Reported 79 improvements in unmatched items and 0 regressions in unmatched items.
PR was closed without merge and explicitly superseded by directory split drafts #2619 through #2630 plus #2632 for Dolphin/SysDolphin support.

smart_moves.text: Used a broad draft to measure cross-directory matching opportunities, then closed it in favor of directory-specific split drafts for reviewability.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: superseded by directory split drafts list

smart_moves.text: Included a narrow verification ledger with diff check, baseline build, changes_all gate, and regression counts.
In THPDec, replaced raw byte-offset mcuBuffer extraction with a named typed view while preserving repeated indexed buffer accesses.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For matching cleanups, a temporary typed overlay/view can be a better source shape than raw pointer arithmetic when the underlying layout is not fully represented by the existing public struct.
Small declaration-order and local-lifetime changes can be legitimate matching tactics, but this PR evidence supports them only as local tactics tied to the reported matches, not as broad style rules.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftCo_DamageIce_Init Mtx local ordering changed
human_pr_text: matching report with zero regressions

decomp_lessons.lesson: Replacing duplicated local sequences with existing helpers can improve source shape and matching when the helper represents the repeated behavior.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftCo_800AB224 repeated CpuCmd calls replaced with ftCo_800AD54C_inline0(fp)
diff_excerpt: gm_80164910 manual unlock search replaced with fn_801605EC(internal_id)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not over-generalize broad data additions from a matching PR; ftmaterial added named static data and achieved reported .data matching, but the excerpt does not show independent ownership evidence beyond the matching report.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: ftmaterial .data listed as new match

naming_conventions.name: THPFileInfoMCUBufferView
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDec.c casts info to THPFileInfoMCUBufferView for mcuBuffer
naming_conventions.notes: The name is only evidenced in the PR diff excerpt; do not promote as a global naming convention without header/source context.

naming_conventions.name: ftCo_LinkCatchAttrs
naming_conventions.kind: typed attrs name replacing struct ftLk_DatAttrs in shown fighter code
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: fn_800D8EC8 attrs type changed from struct ftLk_DatAttrs* to ftCo_LinkCatchAttrs*
naming_conventions.notes: Evidenced as a local type choice in this PR slice.

naming_conventions.name: xBCp
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftkirbyyoshiegg.c inlineB0 adds ftCo_DatAttrs_xBC_t* xBCp
naming_conventions.notes: Supports short role locals for clear substruct pointers, but not a broad standard.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Typed overlay/view cast for a partial struct layout instead of raw offset pointer math.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDec.c mcuBuffer raw offset removed and THPFileInfoMCUBufferView used

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration ordering and delayed initialization adjusted to influence stack/register shape.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ftCo_800D730C fp and x2d0 initialization delayed
diff_excerpt: ftCo_DamageIce_Init Mtx local ordering changed

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK and explicit padding locals used narrowly in functions that the report says matched or improved.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Camera_80030CFC adds u8 _PAD[12] and changes PAD_STACK(14) to PAD_STACK(2)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Raw assert macros were expanded to __assert calls in Camera_80029CF8 for matching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: HSD_ASSERTMSG calls changed to if/ __assert blocks
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This is contrary to the current global cleanup preference for assert macros; PR evidence shows it as a matching tactic, not a standard to promote.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Helper substitution and expression canonicalization: repeated command calls replaced with ftCo_800AD54C_inline0; manual distance formula replaced with ftCo_800A1AB4; explicit if/return bool replaced with ternary.

review_feedback.author: fjooord
review_feedback.text: PR was superseded by directory split drafts #2619-#2630 and #2632.

review_feedback.author: fjooord
review_feedback.text: docs/standards.md was removed from the upstream PR branch; the checklist was kept locally under .codex/skills/melee-pr-workflow/references/ outside the upstream Melee PR surface.

review_feedback.author: fjooord
review_feedback.text: #2618 and #2631 were closed after regrouping support changes into #2632; the extern-only split hit an EditorConfig workflow edge case where all changed files were filtered out.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, counts, changed files
human_pr_text: summary, report, verification, superseding comments
diff_excerpt/raw_diff: representative changed hunks; raw_diff is truncated in loaded_files
notes: PR body and bot-style report provide strong evidence for claimed matching/regression counts, but this intake did not independently run builds or objdiff.
Loaded raw diff is truncated, so detailed lessons are limited to visible hunks and high-level changed-file metadata.
There were zero review comments and zero reviews in metadata; review_feedback is issue-comment/workflow feedback, not reviewer critique.
PR was closed with merged_at null and comments state it was superseded; do not treat changes as merged or accepted upstream from this PR alone.
Some shown tactics, especially assert expansion, PAD_STACK, local extern float, and data additions, may conflict with current global cleanup preferences unless later split PRs justify them.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed partial views can replace raw offset casts during matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: In THPDec.c, PR #2617 replaced a raw `((u8*) info + 0x10)` mcuBuffer cast with repeated `((THPFileInfoMCUBufferView*) info)->mcuBuffer[n]` accesses while improving __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN in the report. Candidate lesson scope should remain partial-layout typed views, not arbitrary overlay casts.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split broad matching drafts by directory for review
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2617 gathered broad matching improvements across 67 files, then was closed and superseded by directory-specific drafts, preserving reviewability while retaining the broad regression report as intake evidence.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: superseded by directory split drafts

source_update_candidates.title: Clarify assert macro expansion as matching-only exception
source_update_candidates.text: Camera_80029CF8 changed HSD_ASSERTMSG macro calls into explicit `if`/`__assert` blocks for a reported improvement. Current standards prefer macro forms; curator may want an explicit note that expansion is a narrow matching tactic requiring verification and should not be promoted as cleanup style.
source_update_candidates.reason: Prevents future curators from treating this PR's matching exception as a general assert cleanup convention.

source_update_candidates.title: Document broad-draft-to-directory-split workflow for large matching batches
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2617 was a 67-file matching draft that was closed in favor of per-directory split drafts. Consider adding workflow guidance that broad exploratory matching branches should be split by directory or subsystem before review, with the broad report retained only as supporting evidence.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: superseded by directory split drafts #2619-#2630 and #2632
source_update_candidates.reason: This is workflow evidence rather than a code style fact; route to standards/workflow curation.

source_update_candidates.title: Directory split mapping for PR #2617 follow-up drafts
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2617 comments map follow-up split drafts to directories: #2632 extern/dolphin and src/sysdolphin; #2619 src/melee/cm; #2620 src/melee/ft; #2621 src/melee/gm; #2622 src/melee/gr; #2623 src/melee/if; #2624 src/melee/it; #2625 src/melee/lb; #2626 src/melee/mn; #2627 src/melee/mp; #2628 src/melee/pl; #2629 src/melee/ty; #2630 src/melee/vi.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for search/navigation, but should be curated as PR-history path metadata rather than inferred source ownership.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PR #2617's changes as merged or accepted; metadata shows CLOSED with merged_at null and comments say superseded.
Do not infer reviewer intent or approval; metadata reports zero reviews and zero review comments.
Do not generalize data additions in ftmaterial or particle into a rule to add named data for matching; evidence only shows reported data matching, not independent ownership proof.
Do not promote local extern float or PAD_STACK usage as normal style without the later split PRs' verification and review context.
